home.coffee.title: Buy me a coffee
home.coffee.text: If you've found value in our resources and digital products, and want to support our work, consider saying thanks with a coffee. Each coffee you buy fuels my creativity and helps us continue to bring you valuable, innovative design resources. Your support means a ton!
home.affiliate.title: Affiliate
home.affiliate.text: If you're a creator looking to earn from our content - join our Gumroad affiliate program and start making {commission}% commission on every sale you bring in 🤑
home.profile.title: Hi👋, We are Selenique Studio
home.profile.text1: We’re a creative duo working with AI to craft visuals that feel alive — full of soul, detail, and story. ✨
home.profile.text2: We’re open to collaborations with brands, bloggers and creators. 🤝
home.profile.text3: We create AI photoshoots, custom content, and tailored prompts for your unique projects. 😎
home.profile.text4: Drop us a message - let’s bring your vision to life together. 😏
